questions.question: Which dentists in Dallas Tx are open on weekends?
questions.answer: Dentists in Dallas Tx with weekend hours include: South Texas Dental (Sat: 09:00-15:00), Fitz Dental (Sat: 10:00-15:00), ToothHQ (Sat: 08:00-17:00), Fresca Dental (Sat: 09:30-14:30), Rio Dental & Orthodontics (Sat: 09:00-15:00), Hermosa Dental & Orthodontics (Sat: 10:00-15:00), Ideal Dental (Sat: 09:00-15:00), Oak Tree Dental (Sat: 08:00-12:00) and 11 more. 19 total with weekend availability.
